on your virtual number am going to purchase ca i send a text from that number

Hello! 

Yes, you can send text messages from your **Virtual Number** with M800. This feature allows businesses to communicate effectively with their customers through SMS, enhancing engagement and providing timely information.

### Benefits of Sending SMS from a Virtual Number:
- **Cost-Effective Communication**: Sending SMS is often more affordable than making voice calls, especially for reaching a large audience.
- **Instant Delivery**: SMS messages are delivered quickly, ensuring that your communication is timely.
- **High Engagement Rates**: Text messages have higher open rates compared to emails, making it a reliable way to reach your customers.
- **Flexibility**: You can send promotional messages, alerts, or reminders directly from your virtual number.

### How to Send SMS from Your Virtual Number:
1. **Log in to your M800 account**.
2. Navigate to the **SMS section** of the dashboard.
3. Select your **Virtual Number** from which you want to send the message.
4. Compose your message in the provided text box.
5. Enter the recipient's phone number.
6. Click on the **Send** button to deliver your message.

For more details on sending SMS, you can refer to our guide here: [How to Send SMS](https://docs.cinnox.com/docs/sending-sms).

If you have any more questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
